terms.hero.title: Terms of Service
terms.toc.title: Contents
terms.acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms.acceptance.p1: By accessing or using the ReserveHub platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to all of these Terms, you may not access or use the Service.
terms.acceptance.p2: These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service. We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Your continued use of the Service following any changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.acceptance.callout: These Terms are a legally binding agreement between you and ReserveHub. Please read them thoroughly.
terms.eligibility.title: Eligibility
terms.eligibility.item1.p3: . Users under 18 must have parental or guardian consent.
terms.eligibility.item2: Be capable of forming a legally binding contract.
terms.eligibility.item3: Not be prohibited from using the Service under applicable laws.
terms.eligibility.item4: Provide accurate and truthful information when creating an account.
terms.accounts.title: User Accounts
terms.accounts.registration.title: Registration
terms.accounts.registration.description: You may need to register for an account to access certain features. You agree to provide accurate, complete, and current information and to update it as necessary.
terms.accounts.security.title: Account Security
terms.accounts.security.item1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
terms.accounts.security.item2: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account.
terms.accounts.security.item3: ReserveHub is not liable for losses resulting from unauthorised account access due to your failure to secure your credentials.
terms.accounts.oneAccount.title: One Account per User
terms.accounts.oneAccount.description: You may not create multiple accounts. We reserve the right to merge or terminate duplicate accounts.
terms.reservations.title: Reservations
terms.reservations.booking.title: Booking
terms.reservations.booking.description: ReserveHub acts as an intermediary between diners and restaurant partners. By making a reservation, you enter into an agreement with the restaurant, not ReserveHub.
terms.reservations.cancellations.title: Cancellations & No-Shows
terms.reservations.cancellations.item1: Cancellation policies vary by restaurant and will be clearly displayed before you confirm a booking.
terms.reservations.cancellations.item2: Repeated no-shows may result in temporary or permanent suspension of your booking privileges.
terms.reservations.cancellations.item3: ReserveHub is not responsible for restaurant cancellations, but we will endeavour to notify you promptly.
terms.reservations.accuracy.title: Accuracy
terms.reservations.accuracy.description: Restaurant information (menus, hours, availability, pricing) is provided by our restaurant partners. While we make reasonable efforts to ensure accuracy, we cannot guarantee that all information is current.
terms.reservations.warning: Always confirm your reservation details directly with the restaurant if you have any concerns.
terms.conduct.title: User Conduct
terms.conduct.intro: You agree not to use the Service to:
terms.conduct.item1: Violate any local, national, or international law or regulation.
terms.conduct.item3: Harass, abuse, or harm restaurant staff or other users.
terms.conduct.item4: Transmit spam, malware, or other harmful code.
terms.conduct.item5: Scrape, crawl, or systematically extract data from the platform.
terms.conduct.item6: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of the Service.
terms.conduct.item8: Engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits others from using the Service.
terms.conduct.conclusion: Violation of these rules may result in immediate account termination and, where applicable, legal action.
terms.content.title: User Content
terms.content.reviews.title: Reviews & Ratings
terms.content.reviews.description: When you submit reviews, ratings, or other content ("User Content"), you grant ReserveHub a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide licence to use, display, and distribute that content on our platform.
terms.content.standards.title: Content Standards
terms.content.standards.item1: Be defamatory, obscene, offensive, or misleading.
terms.content.standards.item3: Include personal information about other individuals without their consent.
terms.content.standards.item4: Be generated by bots or artificial means to manipulate ratings.
terms.content.removal.title: Removal
terms.content.removal.description: We reserve the right to remove User Content that violates these standards without prior notice.
terms.restaurants.title: Restaurant Partners
terms.restaurants.intro: ReserveHub is a platform that connects diners with restaurant partners. Please note:
terms.restaurants.item1: Restaurants listed on ReserveHub operate independently and are solely responsible for their food, service, and compliance with health and safety regulations.
terms.restaurants.item2: ReserveHub does not endorse any specific restaurant and is not responsible for the quality of food, service, or any dining experience.
terms.restaurants.item3: Any disputes arising from your dining experience should be resolved directly with the restaurant.
terms.restaurants.item4: Pricing, menus, and hours displayed are subject to change at the restaurant's discretion.
terms.ip.title: Intellectual Property
terms.ip.p1: All content on the ReserveHub platform — including but not limited to the logo, design, text, graphics, and software — is the exclusive property of ReserveHub and protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
terms.ip.p2: You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, or exploit any content from our platform without our express written permission.
terms.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
terms.disclaimer.intro.p1: The Service is provided on an
terms.disclaimer.intro.p5: basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to:
terms.disclaimer.item3: Accuracy or reliability of information provided by restaurant partners.
terms.disclaimer.item4: Freedom from viruses or other harmful components.
terms.liability.title: Limitation of Liability
terms.liability.intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, ReserveHub and its affiliates, officers, employees, and agents shall not be liable for any:
terms.liability.item1: Indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.
terms.liability.item2: Loss of profits, revenue, data, or goodwill.
terms.liability.item3: Damages arising from your reliance on information obtained through the Service.
terms.liability.item4: Damages resulting from unauthorised access to or alteration of your transmissions or data.
terms.liability.conclusion: Our total liability to you for all claims arising from use of the Service shall not exceed the greater of: (a) the amount you paid to ReserveHub in the 12 months prior to the claim, or (b) $100.
terms.termination.title: Termination
terms.termination.intro: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe:
terms.termination.item1: Violates these Terms or any applicable law.
terms.termination.item2: Is harmful to other users, restaurant partners, third parties, or ReserveHub.
terms.termination.item3: Is fraudulent or abusive in nature.
terms.termination.conclusion: You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately.
terms.governing.title: Governing Law
terms.governing.p1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which ReserveHub is incorporated, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms.governing.p2: Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that jurisdiction. You waive any objection to venue in such courts.
terms.contact.title: Contact Us
terms.contact.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
terms.contact.address: ReserveHub HQ, 123 Dining Avenue, Food City, FC 12345
